title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LANGANGAN IN THE PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO SANTA PRAXEDES.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 10071 / 61 OG No. 17, 2466 (April 26, 1965)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4149, June 20, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF LANGANGAN IN THE PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO SANTA PRAXEDES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Langangan in the Province of Cagayan, is hereby changed to Santa Praxedes.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1964.
